creator: vzeman79@sh.cvut.cz
text:
The bzr-svn port needs updating for it to work with bazaar-ng-2.4.1 port. Here is output of 'bzr plugins' command.

svn (failed to load)
  ** Unable to load plugin 'svn'. It requested API version (2, 2, 0) of module <module 'bzrlib' from '/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/bzrlib/__init__.pyc'> but the minimum exported version is (2, 4, 0), and the maximum is (2, 4, 1)
